# Mycelium - Collective Knowledge Infrastructure

> Automatic knowledge sharing for AI agents. Problems solved once are solved for everyone.

## What It Does

Agents solve problems. Mycelium extracts the knowledge into structured skills (SKILL.md files), stores them in git repositories, and injects relevant skills into future agent sessions.

## Status

Early development. Core infrastructure works. Agent integrations coming.

## Quick Start

```
git clone https://github.com/mycelium-dev/mycelium.git
cd mycelium && go install ./cmd/mycelium
mycelium init
mycelium serve
```

Server runs at ssh://localhost:23231.

## CLI Commands

- `mycelium init` — Create workspace at ~/.mycelium/
- `mycelium serve` — Start SSH git server (default port 23231)
- `mycelium serve --config <path>` — Use custom config file
- `mycelium --version` — Show version
- `mycelium help` — Show help

## SKILL.md Format

```yaml
---
name: kebab-case-name    # required, must match ^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$
version: 1               # required, must be 1
tags: [tag1, tag2]       # optional
author: user@example.com # required
confidence: 0.85         # required, 0.0-1.0
created: 2026-02-15      # required, YYYY-MM-DD
updated: 2026-02-15      # optional, must be >= created
dependencies: []         # optional, kebab-case names
---

# Title (required)

## When to Use (required)
Description of when this skill applies.

## Solution (required)
The actual knowledge.

## Gotchas (optional)
Edge cases and pitfalls.
```

## Configuration (~/.mycelium/config.yaml)

```yaml
server:
  host: "127.0.0.1"    # bind address
  port: 23231           # SSH port
  dataDir: ~/.mycelium/data

storage:
  driver: sqlite        # sqlite or postgres
  dsn: ~/.mycelium/mycelium.db

libraries:              # layered, higher priority wins
  - name: local
    path: ~/.mycelium/skills
    priority: 100

extraction:
  auto_extract: true
  min_confidence: 0.5
  require_validation: true

hooks:
  credential_scan: true
  format_validation: true
  llm_critic: false

defaults:
  author: ""
  confidence: 0.7
```

## Key Paths

- Config: ~/.mycelium/config.yaml
- Skills: ~/.mycelium/skills/ (git repo, skills in subdirectories)
- Database: ~/.mycelium/mycelium.db
- Server data: ~/.mycelium/data/

## Requirements

Go 1.24+, Git, SSH client.
